Bodha™ Learning Platform

Design the City
of Tomorrow

Build a complete smart city from the ground up. Zone by zone, building by building — then step inside each one.

Interactive 12×12 city grid — 8 zones, 20 buildings
Enter any building for an immersive interior experience
Design rooms, activate IoT sensors, track CO₂ live
Real-time city metrics · Team play · Expert challenges
